name: WP Engine Production Deploy
description: Backs up and deploys the theme to WP Engine production on PR merge, then creates a versioned GitHub release. Requires WPE_SSHG_KEY_PRIVATE, WPE_API_USER_ID, WPE_API_PASSWORD, WPE_INSTALL_ID secrets and WPE_PROD_ENV variable. Optionally uses SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL for failure alerts.
